reviews.comment:
En ocasiones hay mucha espera.
Los playeros son lentos y pierden mucho tiempo.
Debería haber por lo menos 2 o 3 darsenas para socios

(Translated by Google)
Sometimes there are long waits.
The beach attendants are slow and waste a lot of time.
There should be at least two or three berths for members.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlNDRXdDVRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Esta bastante bien baños limpios

(Translated by Google)
It's pretty good, the bathrooms are clean.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlNDhidDZRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Excelente servicio. Muy completo

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. Very comprehensive.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlNmRmVkRnEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy buena atención. Habría que obligar a que la circulación por la playa sea a 5 o 10km/h y con luces prendidas, ya que hay algunos conductores se creen que están en F1

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. They should enforce a speed limit of 5 or 10 km/h on the beach and require drivers to use their lights, as some seem to think they're in Formula 1.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlNmF1V1dBEAE

reviews.comment:
Muy cómodo, y rico!

(Translated by Google)
Very comfortable, and delicious!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlOFlMRDhBRRAB

reviews.comment:
Bajo mucho la buena atención de los playeros. Y el lavado de autos cierra a 18 en punto los domingos.

(Translated by Google)
The service from the beach attendants has declined significantly. And the car wash closes at 6 PM on Sundays.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5256422588388150484/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURlZ2F6U2F3EAE
